issues.note: Local-CLI issue counts on the same pattern config; the only change this run is repo-local file exclusions. 54 (prior tuned run, no exclusions) -> 34 (-37%). All remaining: Security (32) + ErrorProne (2) in product code.

noisyButKept: All 32 Security findings retained in product code; no security pattern disabled — exclusions only remove non-product paths (docs/tests/fixtures).

keyImprovements: Added repo-local .codacy.yaml file exclusions (the prior run added none) covering docs/, all tests (__tests__, *.test.*, e2e *.spec.*), eval fixtures, and vendored/generated paths.
Local issues 54 -> 34 (-37%) on the identical pattern set — pure noise removal from non-product code; full Security + ErrorProne coverage on product code preserved.
Mirrored the same exclude globs into .codacy/codacy.config.json so local CLI analysis matches Cloud.
No tool/pattern/standard changes: tool & pattern selection stays governed by the org rknightion-standard (id 159741); repo stays assigned.
notes: Repo is on Codacy Cloud and assigned to the org standard rknightion-standard (id 159741). Per guardrails, no cloud import of patterns/tools was performed (that would 409 against the standard) and the standard/assignment was left untouched. File exclusions are not importable via API regardless; they apply on Cloud via the committed .codacy.yaml read from the default branch.
